name: Andai Tiada Dia
overview: Tells the story of a couple Suri (Ummi Nazeera) and Haikal (Hisyam Hamid) who have been married for seven years but have not yet been blessed with offspring. Stressed by the situation, Suri asked for permission from Haikal to do IVF treatment, but Haikal was not interested because he was already happy with their childless life.
